title: Paradise Delight
description: Paradise Lost add-on for Farmer's Delight
body:
### Overview
Paradise Delight is a small addon to Farmer's Delight that adds some new foods using materials from Paradise Lost. 

### Feature List
- Adds straw drops to Paradise Lost tall grass
- Adds clay generation to Paradise Lost (to make sure almost everything is craftable using resources there)
- Olvite can be used in place of Iron for some Farmer's Delight blocks and items
- Floestone Stove
- Olvite Knife
- Red Onion and Lettuce crops (wild versions can be found across the dimension's biomes)
- Amadrys dough and pie crust (with recipe integration!)
- Sliced moa meat
- Moa Dumplings and Moa Wrap
- Blackcurrant and Popom Jelly jars

### Planned Features
- New/unique food options

### Credits
This mod's textures are derivatives of textures in Farmer's Delight, licensed under the [MIT license](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/).
